Honey never spoils when stored properly.
Octopuses have three hearts.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries, but strawberries are not.
The shortest war in recorded history lasted under an hour.
Some turtles can breathe through parts of their body not used by humans for breathing.
The Eiffel Tower can be slightly taller in summer due to thermal expansion.
Sea otters hold hands while sleeping so they do not drift apart.
A bolt of lightning is hotter than the surface of the sun.
There are more possible chess games than atoms estimated in the observable universe.
Koalas have fingerprints that can resemble human fingerprints.
Scotland’s national animal is the unicorn.
The Moon is moving away from Earth by a few centimetres each year.
Wombat droppings are famously cube-shaped.
Sharks existed before many tree species evolved.
The first alarm clock could only ring at one preset time.
Some bamboo species can grow incredibly quickly in a single day.
A group of flamingos is called a flamboyance.
The longest English word without a true vowel is often given as 'rhythms'.
The world’s oldest known musical instrument is more than 40,000 years old.
